TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tjaranauma, title = Tjaranauma, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tjaranauma} }

S.FORM: alang Tjaranauma ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Taybu go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 125 buwan, 543 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 538 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 5 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 94%, Amis 2%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Tjaranauma hya' ga Ludja. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Tjaranauma ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Taybu go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 125 buwan, 543 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 538 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 5 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 94%, Amis 2%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Tjaranauma hya' ga Ludja. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tjaranauma ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu tajβu ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na tjaranauma ħjaʔ ɣa lu*ja. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
